description:
Pure rename for clarity, plus a debug assertion that catches annotation list length mismatches early.

## What to change

In ast.rs, FnClause:
  - param_type_tokens: Vec<Option<Vec<Token>>>  → param_annotations: Vec<Option<Vec<Token>>>

Update all references across the codebase (parser, ir_lower.rs, any tests).

In ir_lower.rs, wherever param_annotations is accessed:
  - Add: debug_assert_eq!(clause.params.len(), clause.param_annotations.len(), "param/annotation length mismatch");

## Why the assert

Silent param/annotation count mismatch causes type widening to any downstream. Catching it at the source saves debugging.

## Acceptance
- cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes.
- All tests pass.
- One commit referencing fz-ty1.pip.7.
title: fz-ty1.pip.7: rename FnClause::param_type_tokens → param_annotations + length invariant
